untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of mutual fund cash reserves vs. short-term interest rates linear regression and standard deviation divergence. Neither 'mutual fund cash reserves' nor 'short-term interest rates' are available in the allowed indicator set. This is a macro/institutional flow indicator requiring external data sources not present in the price/technical indicator universe.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_2 (Fosback Index derivative) fundamentally relies on institutional cash flow data and macro interest rate regime that cannot be constructed from OHLCV price action alone. The signal requires: (1) mutual fund cash level time series, (2) short-term interest rate time series, (3) 63-day rolling linear regression fit, (4) residual standard deviation calculation. All entry logic is predicated on this external data source. The 0.5% hard stop and 20-day max hold are translatable, but without the core cash reserve divergence metric, the signal cannot be operationalized.
